description_long: This is a long, rectangular desk with a dark, wood-textured top surface featuring a slatted pattern, supported by two sturdy white base units on either end. The desk includes open shelving on both sides, providing ample storage space beneath the work surface. Four rectangular, flat panels are positioned above the desk, likely intended as overhead shelves or modular attachments. The central section of the desk is open, allowing for legroom or the placement of additional equipment. The overall design is modern and functional, suitable for collaborative or technical workspaces. The materials and construction suggest durability and a focus on utility.
description: A modern, long desk with a slatted wood top, white base units with open shelves, and four overhead shelf panels.
description_view_0: Side view showing the desk's depth, slatted wood top, and the vertical alignment of the overhead shelves.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the full length of the desk, open shelving on both ends, and the symmetrical arrangement of the overhead shelves.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, highlighting the desk's depth and the stacked overhead shelves.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the open shelving units and the alignment of the overhead shelves above the desk.
attribute_orientation: The user-facing side is the long edge with open shelving units beneath, intended for seating and access to storage; the overhead shelves are positioned above the main work surface.
attribute_usage_context: laboratory workbench or collaborative technical workstation
